what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG outline star icon using a single polygon with currentColor stroke and no fill.
observations: The root svg sets xmlns, viewBox 0 0 24 24, width 24, and height 24.
The icon uses fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" so its color can inherit from context.
Stroke styling is 1.5 width with round line caps and round line joins.
The star is drawn as one polygon with ten coordinate points.
conventions: Uses SVG presentation attributes directly on elements.
Repeats stroke-linejoin on the polygon while also setting it on the root svg.
concerns: The duplicate stroke-linejoin attribute is redundant within this file.
notes: A compact theme-color star outline icon represented by one polygon.
questions: Should the redundant polygon-level stroke-linejoin remain for explicitness or be omitted?
Is the 1.5 stroke width part of a broader icon stroke convention?
purpose_vs_actual: The path and filename indicate a star SVG icon, and the file draws a star outline icon.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable star icon that adapts to surrounding text or UI color through currentColor.
contribution: Contributes a lightweight star outline asset with inherited color, fixed 24px sizing, and simple polygon geometry for use in icon surfaces.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 SVG star outline icon drawn with a single no-fill polygon using currentColor stroke styling.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for providing a reusable theme-aware star icon asset in an SVG icon set.
